subcodes.first_line: This is a Book sent down by the Wronged One unto him who hath advanced toward the Praiseworthy Station, wherein the Call hath been raised that there is none [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله المظلوم لمن اقبل الی المقام المحمود الذی فیه ارتفع الندآء انه لا
